channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Tate brothers will fight extradition to the UK. But the law makes it difficult to win
item.description: Any extradition of Andrew and Tristan Tate from the U.S. to the United Kingdom would ultimately rest with the State Department.

item.title: US soldiers killed by Iran were from Texas and Hawaii, military says
Tropical Storm Bertha in the Gulf of Mexico moving toward Florida Panhandle and Alabama
